allow: PowerShell($dirs = @\('src\\app','src\\features\\feeds','src\\features\\sleep','src\\features\\diapers','src\\features\\baby','src\\shared\\db','src\\shared\\ui','src\\shared\\time','src\\shared\\theme','src\\pages'\); foreach \($d in $dirs\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $d -Force | Out-Null; New-Item -ItemType File -Path "$d\\.gitkeep" -Force | Out-Null }; Write-Output "folder layout created")
